page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A complete suite for gene-by-gene schema creation and strain identification
page_metadata.biotools__summary: chewBBACA is a software suite for the creation and evaluation of core genome and whole genome MultiLocus Sequence Typing (cg/wgMLST) schemas and results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: chewBBACA is a software suite for the creation and evaluation of core genome and whole genome MultiLocus Sequence Typing (cg/wgMLST) schemas and results.
